name: Misha
desc: A well-behaved young man serving as a hotel bellboy in Penacony.\nMisha has a great longing for the Nameless and dreams of one day embarking on a journey of his own.

1.name: Whimsicality of Fancy
1.desc: When using the Ultimate, for every enemy on the field, additionally increases the Hits Per Action for the current Ultimate by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> hit(s), up to a maximum increase of <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> hit(s).

2.name: Yearning of Youth
2.desc: Before each hit of the Ultimate lands, there is a <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak> <u>base chance</u> of reducing the target's DEF by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s).

30000001.name: Base Chance
30000001.desc: The base chance of applying debuffs to targets hit. \nThe final probability is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit Rate and enemy targets' Effect RES.

3.name: Vestige of Happiness
3.desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

4.name: Visage of Kinship
4.desc: Increases the DMG multiplier for each hit of the Ultimate by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

5.name: Genesis of First Love
5.desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

6.name: Estrangement of Dream
6.desc: When using the Ultimate, increases own DMG by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>, lasting until the end of the turn. In addition, the next time the Skill is used, recovers <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Skill Point(s) for the team.

131201.name: E—Excuse Me, Please!
131201.desc: Deals Ice DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Misha's ATK to one designated enemy target.
131201.simple_desc: Deals minor Ice DMG to one enemy.

131202.name: R—Room Service!
131202.desc: Increases the Hits Per Action for Misha's next Ultimate by <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> hit(s). Deals Ice DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Misha's ATK to one designated enemy target, and Ice DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of Misha's ATK to adjacent targets.
131202.simple_desc: Deals Ice DMG to an enemy and minor Ice DMG to enemies adjacent to them. In addition, increases Misha's next <color=#f29e38ff>Ultimate's Hits Per Action</color>.

131203.name: G—Gonna Be Late!
131203.desc: Has <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Hits Per Action by default. First, uses 1 hit to deal Ice DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of Misha's ATK to one designated enemy target. Then, the rest of the hits each deals Ice DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of Misha's ATK to one random enemy. Just before each hit lands, there is a <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[f1]%</unbreak></color> <u>base chance</u> to Freeze the target, lasting for 1 turn.\nWhile Frozen, enemy targets cannot take any actions, and at the start of their turn, they receive Ice <u>Additional DMG</u> equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color> of Misha's ATK.\nThis Ultimate can possess up to <unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak> Hits Per Action. After the Ultimate is used, its Hits Per Action will be reset to the default level.
131203.simple_desc: Deals minor Ice DMG to single enemies. The attack bounces <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color> times by default and up to a maximum of <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak></color> times. Before each hit lands, there is a minor chance to <color=#f29e38ff>Freeze</color> the target.

10000005.name: Additional DMG
10000005.desc: Causes the target being hit to take extra DMG, which is not considered an attack.

30000001.name: Base Chance
30000001.desc: The base chance of applying debuffs to targets hit. \nThe final probability is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit Rate and enemy targets' Effect RES.

131204.name: Horological Escapement
131204.desc: For every 1 Skill Point allies consume, Misha's next Ultimate delivers <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> more Hit(s) Per Action, and Misha regenerates <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[f1]</unbreak></color> Energy.
131204.simple_desc: For <color=#f29e38ff>every 1 Skill Point allies consume</color>, Misha's next Ultimate <color=#f29e38ff>delivers more Hits Per Action</color>, and Misha regenerates his Energy.

131206.name: Attack
131206.desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

131207.name: Wait, You Are So Beautiful!
131207.desc: After using the Technique, creates a Special Dimension that lasts for <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> seconds. Enemies caught in the Special Dimension are inflicted with Dream Prison and stop all their actions. Upon entering battle against enemies afflicted with Dream Prison, increases the Hits Per Action for Misha's next Ultimate by <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> hit(s). Only 1 Dimension Effect created by allies can exist at the same time.
131207.simple_desc: Creates a Special Dimension that stops all enemies within. Upon entering battle against enemies within the dimension, Misha's <color=#f29e38ff>next Ultimate deals more Hits Per Action</color>.

1.point_desc: Before the Ultimate's first hit, increases the <u>base chance</u> of Freezing the target by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

30000001.name: Base Chance
30000001.desc: The base chance of applying debuffs to targets hit. \nThe final probability is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit Rate and enemy targets' Effect RES.

1.point_desc: When using the Ultimate, increases the Effect Hit Rate by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>, lasting until the end of the current Ultimate's action.
When dealing DMG to Frozen enemies, increases CRIT DMG by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.
